channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LUDOC-11] miscellaneous documentation fixes
item.description: This bug is to track miscellaneous minor documentation fixes, for problems observed while viewing the manual.

status.description: This issue was once resolved, but the resolution was deemed incorrect. From here issues are either marked assigned or resolved.

comments.comment:
"Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/doc/manual/+/57803/
Subject: LUDOC-11 misc: update limits to more recent values
Project: doc/manual
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:

Project: doc/manual
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 02c9e12ff92a865be3ba1c27a29b781035605cef

typo in section 5.3.2, Note #2

current "may increase significantly if substantial errors are detected and need to be required."

should be "may increase significantly if substantial errors are detected and need to be repaired."

Joe, this ticket is just a catch-all for simple changes to the manual, if there isn't already an LUDOC ticket open for the change. Since changes to the manual are typically self-descriptive from the commit message and the actual text, there isn't a huge need to create a new LUDOC ticket for each one, unless as a placeholder for changes that need to be done.
All patches for this ticket have been merged.

Patch to fix typos and ost-survey example in the Benchmarking Tests section at http://review.whamcloud.com/11976 .

This includes the fixing the typo Scott found.

Typo in

25.3.2. Testing Network Performance
...
$ nobjhi=2 thrhi=2 size=1024 targets="oss0 oss1" \
case=network sh odbfilter-survey

should be "obdfilter-survey" not odbfilter

Call me a pessimist, but I can't think there are no miscellaneous documentation fixes still to come.

Reopening so we have a ticket to record typos, spelling etc fixes.
All fixes above this point have been completed, reviewed, and merged.
Approved and merged.
Changes pushed to gerrit (empty index entry fixed, xrefs added) - ready for review at http://review.whamcloud.com/7945

Add xref to Section 16.3 (Upgrade) pointing to new section 18.6 - Lustre Striping Internals
Glossary - update wide-striping entry to add xref to Chapter 18
Changed to 24.6.1 approved and merged in http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/7819/

Remove empty index entry in section 16.3.

In section 24.6.1 "Using stats_collect", change block to bulk.

some fixes for chapter 31.9:
http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/7628/

Minor document corrections:
http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,5976

Minor fixes:
http://review.whamcloud.com/5853
